name: Mesh
description: Crypto payments and account connectivity API connecting 300+ exchanges and wallets.

seo.title: Mesh — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Mesh: Crypto payments and account connectivity API connecting 300+ exchanges and wallets.

when_to_use: Connecting 300+ crypto exchange and wallet accounts via single API
Crypto payment acceptance from users' existing exchange accounts
Transfer from Coinbase, Binance, or Kraken directly to app wallet
Crypto account aggregation API for Web3 portfolio and DeFi products

pros: Single API for broad crypto connectivity
review.verdict: Useful connectivity layer for crypto platforms — think Plaid for exchanges, not a traditional gateway.
review.best_for: Crypto apps and tax tools needing exchange and wallet aggregation
review.not_for: Fiat-only merchants or teams needing payment acceptance

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
